params.description: On Apr 21, 1667, the British poet Milton wrote the epic poem, "Paradise Lost". "Paradise Lost" has 12 volumes and more than 10,000 lives. The books tells the story of the Fall of Mankind in an allusive and elevated writing style. The poem talks about the fallen angel Satan thrown into hell for disobeying God. For revenge, he sneaked into the Garden of Eden and tempted the ancestors of mankind, Adam and Eve, to eat the forbidden fruit. In the end, humans were exiled and Satan plunged into an even …
